name: Nan city / Route 101 urban corridor
capture_notes: Nan city core with retail (Big C/Lotus), hospital, bus terminal, airport, and tourism anchors. Route 101 main corridor.

name: Wiang Sa / Route 101 south corridor
capture_notes: Wiang Sa district town on Route 101; important south Nan corridor stop with intercity and local demand.

name: Pua / Doi Phu Kha tourism corridor
capture_notes: North Nan tourism gateway with Doi Phu Kha National Park; seasonal tourism and Route 1081/1148 corridor.

name: Tha Wang Pha / Route 1081 corridor
capture_notes: Tha Wang Pha district on Route 1081 north of Nan city; moderate local and corridor demand.

name: Na Noi / Route 101 south gateway
capture_notes: Na Noi district on Route 101 south approach; important corridor stop for travelers from Phrae/Den Chai.
